summary: Iteration 117 - Comprehensive frontend testing of TrendScout marketing website improvements across 12 areas. All major features verified: homepage sections, cookie consent, sample analysis page, viability score page, about page, cookie policy, pricing page, mobile responsiveness, internal linking, and alternate routes. 100% pass rate on critical features.
passed_tests: Homepage hero headline: 'Find products that can actually sell in the UK.'
Homepage hero has 3 value points (trend detection, saturation analysis, UK viability)
Homepage primary CTA links to /signup with A/B tested text
Homepage secondary CTA 'See How It Works' links to /how-it-works
Trust bar shows 4 items: 'Built for UK ecommerce sellers', '7-signal scoring model', 'Multi-channel product intelligence', 'Shopify, TikTok Shop & Amazon UK'
Who it's for section renders 4 audience cards
UK differentiation section with 'Not every viral product works in the UK' heading
How it works section: 3 steps
Feature highlights: 4 cards
Proof section: 'Want to see what TrendScout actually shows you?' with link to /sample-product-analysis
Pricing preview: 3 plans in GBP (£19, £39, £79) with Growth highlighted
Final CTA section with primary link to /signup
Cookie consent banner appears with 'Accept all' and 'Reject non-essential' buttons
Cookie consent banner disappears after clicking Accept
Cookie consent banner disappears after clicking Reject
Cookie consent stored in localStorage key 'ts_cookie_consent'
Sample analysis page: product image visible
Sample analysis page: Launch Score (74) visible
Sample analysis page: UK Viability Score (78) visible
Sample analysis page: 7-signal breakdown present
Sample analysis page: channel fit (TikTok Shop UK, Shopify Store, Amazon.co.uk)
Sample analysis page: strengths section visible
Sample analysis page: risks section visible
Sample analysis page: next steps section visible
Sample analysis page: CTA present
Sample analysis page: internal links include For Shopify Sellers, For TikTok Shop UK, For Amazon UK Sellers
Viability score page: renders with headline 'UK Product Viability Score'
Viability score page: 7 factors documented
Viability score page: examples present
Viability score page: FAQ section with 6 questions
Viability score page: CTA 'View Sample Analysis' links to /sample-product-analysis
About page: scoring methodology section present
About page: link to /methodology present
About page: link to /sample-product-analysis present
Cookie policy page: Essential cookies category documented
Cookie policy page: Analytics cookies category documented
Cookie policy page: Preference cookies category documented
Cookie policy page: consent mechanism explained with ts_cookie_consent
Pricing page: GBP-first pricing (£19, £39, £79)
Pricing page: plan names Starter/Growth/Pro
Pricing page: Starter tagline 'Start validating product ideas'
Pricing page: Growth tagline 'Best for serious sellers'
Pricing page: Pro tagline 'For agencies and power users'
Pricing page: billing toggle (Monthly/Annual) visible
Pricing page: feature comparison table visible
Pricing page: FAQ section with 6 questions
HTML lang attribute is 'en-GB'
Mobile responsiveness: hero section visible
Mobile responsiveness: mobile menu toggle visible
Mobile responsiveness: pricing preview visible
Mobile responsiveness: cookie banner visible with accessible buttons
Internal linking: footer has Sample Analysis link
Internal linking: footer has Refund Policy link
Route /for-shopify-sellers works
Route /for-amazon-uk-sellers works
critical_code_review_comments: Cookie consent implementation is well-designed with localStorage persistence and consent-gated GA4/GTM loading
Sample analysis page provides comprehensive product intelligence with all 7 signals, channel fit, strengths, risks, and next steps
Pricing page correctly displays GBP pricing with proper plan names and taglines
HTML lang='en-GB' correctly set for UK-first positioning
Footer has comprehensive internal linking including Sample Analysis and Refund Policy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 117 verified comprehensive site-wide improvements: Homepage (hero with 'Find products that can actually sell in the UK', 3 value points, trust bar with 4 items, 4 audience cards, UK differentiation, 3 how-it-works steps, 4 feature cards, proof section, pricing preview with GBP, final CTA). Cookie consent banner works correctly with Accept/Reject buttons and localStorage persistence. Sample analysis page has product image, Launch Score, UK Viability Score, 7-signal breakdown, channel fit, strengths, risks, next steps, and internal links. Viability score page has factors, examples, FAQ, and CTA. About page has scoring methodology section with links. Cookie policy documents all 3 cookie categories. Pricing page has GBP pricing, correct plan names/taglines, billing toggle, comparison table, FAQ. HTML lang='en-GB'. Mobile responsive. Footer has Sample Analysis and Refund Policy links. Alternate routes work.
console_warnings: 403 error on some resource (non-critical, likely analytics or external resource)
